2951624.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2951624.description: Lemmy the robot returns from Mars.  Unknowingly a space squid has stowed away in his chest cavity. // Careless Alice over chlorinates the otter habitat and Marlene's fur is bleached.  Her new look captivates the attention of the other zoo animals.

2951667.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2951667.description: The zoo animals are suffering a heat wave. The penguins have a plan to beat the heat, but they need Alice out of the way. With her gone, they get to work. // Private is smitten with the zoo nurse. The only way he can see her is if he gets injured.

2972857.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2972857.description: The Penguins set out to perform their own good deeds. But things don't work out as planned. // While Mort and Private stop to liberate Cheezy Bitz from the zoo vending machine they are both sucked in.

2972917.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2972917.description: It's game night and the penguins are playing hot potato with a live bomb. // According to the penguin's intel, the sewer rats are up to something BIG. They need an undercover operative. But who is rat-like enough to pull off such a mission? Mort.

2980264.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2980264.description: The toy manufacturer of Rico's doll-girlfriend has upgraded their doll line with a voice chip. // When the penguins are photographed while in action and placed on the new zoo poster they have to stop the presses before the poster gets out.

2990217.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2990217.description: King Julien observes children chasing each other, calling out "cooties". He deduces that girls pass this wretched "cooties" with a simple touch. // When Rico crashes the Penguins car and rebuilds it himself, it becomes "possessed" and targets Rico.

3009584.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3009584.description: Private's quirky Uncle Nigel pops in for a  visit from across the pond. // The boys intercept a fax with cartographic news; Maurice has only 24 hours to live. In order to make Maurice's assumed final day comfortable, the entire zoo bands together.

3009645.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3009645.description: Private discovers a stack of lost comic books. Skipper immediately commands their destruction, citing their risky influence. // Shakespeare in the park has inspired Private as he struts around the zoo spouting iambic pentameter laden insults.

3018313.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3018313.description: An accidental zap from the Fresherizer ray turns Skipper into an adorable baby. // The zoo animals are in a panic when word reaches them that Savio the boa constrictor has escaped from the Hoboken Zoo and is heading to them bent on revenge.

3018372.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3018372.description: Kowalski's obsession with Doris the dolphin drives him to invent a love ray, the Love-U-Laser. // Told as a courtroom flashback, Kowalski unwisely revives Jiggles in a small, whipped cream-eating version.

3027669.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3027669.description: Marlene is dying to go see a concert in the park. But, every time she leaves the zoo she becomes a feral monster! // Ma, an empty-nested mother possum, takes up residence in the Penguins Lair after they destroy her home.

3027710.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3027710.description: It's off to the races when Skipper agrees to give a day off from hard training to the first penguin who can bring him a kipper. // The penguins are determined to make opening day of their favorite action star's blockbuster movie!

3094830.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3094830.description: When the penguins discover Skipper's idol, Rockgut, they fall under his paranoid spell. // Kowalski threatens to tear the space/time continuum with his time machine. He sends his future self to stop his present self from completing the time machine.

2986815.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2986815.description: The Penguins are faced with a global battle when their specialty food-making machine belches out a toxic cloud that threatens not just the zoo, not just the city, but the earth itself!

2986871.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2986871.description: King Julien is literally bounced out of his kingdom and onto the New York streets. // Skipper is forced to live his worst nightmare when he's doused with Inflatium and stress causes him to blow up like a balloon.

2989902.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2989902.description: Marlene is dying to go see a concert in the park. But, every time she leaves the zoo she becomes a feral monster! // Ma, an empty-nested mother possum, takes up residence in the Penguins Lair after they destroy her home.

2989988.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2989988.description: When the penguins send Rico off to help King Julien an unlikely friendship develops between the two. // When King Julien steals Kowalski's new invention - a helmet that can make whatever you are thinking happen - he creates chaos at the zoo.

2995352.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2995352.description: It's off to the races when Skipper agrees to give a day off from hard training to the first penguin who can bring him a kipper. // The penguins are determined to make opening day of their favorite action star's blockbuster movie!

2995437.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2995437.description: Private has to get over his fear of roaches and use them to help him free the other penguins from the grip of Officer X. // The penguins discover a kid on a field trip to the zoo has seen one of their covert missions.

3000377.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3000377.description: When the penguins discover Skipper's idol, Rockgut, they fall under his paranoid spell. // Kowalski threatens to tear the space/time continuum with his time machine. He sends his future self to stop his present self from completing the time machine.

3015133.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3015133.description: Kowalski's obsession with Doris the dolphin drives him to invent a love ray, the Love-U-Laser. // Told as a courtroom flashback, Kowalski unwisely revives Jiggles in a small, whipped cream-eating version.

3015188.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3015188.description: The Commissioner flips his lid. His toupee blows off and sticks to Maurice, who also gets red cheeks and a skinned tail, all by accident. // Shelly the ostrich gets stuck in drying cement and only Rico can save her.

3017185.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3017185.description: The Penguins are faced with a global battle when their specialty food-making machine belches out a toxic cloud that threatens not just the zoo, not just the city, but the earth itself!

3017280.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3017280.description: When Roger's home in the sewer becomes unbearable the Penguins try to find him a new home in the city. Soon citizens of New York city spot Roger all over town. // The Penguins have to protect the City Zoo Commisioner from Frankie the pigeons wrath.

3036067.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3036067.description: The penguins plan a vacation on the high seas but a storm blows them off course onto the streets of Hoboken, New Jersey. After being taken to the Hoboken Zoo and meeting some old friends, Skipper is adamant the zoo holds a sinister secret.

3036809.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3036809.description: The Vesuvius Twins bring Skipper and Julien to their home and force them to fight one another. // Kowalski has another breakthrough invention, tiny robots that group together and not only fix broken tools and appliances, but run them as well.

3038718.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3038718.description: King Julien is literally bounced out of his kingdom and onto the New York streets. // Skipper is forced to live his worst nightmare when he's doused with Inflatium and stress causes him to blow up like a balloon.

3038812.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3038812.description: The penguins accidentally launch Leonard the Koala out of the zoo and into midtown Manhattan. // When all the little mammals in the zoo start to disappear the penguins suspect the new boa constrictor, Salvio.

3054496.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3054496.description: King Julien's archrival, Clemson, returns in another attempt to claim the lemur crown. // Private's favorite treat, the Peanut Butter Winky, is going the way of the dinosaur.

3054552.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3054552.description: Kowalski invents an enemy detector but it doesn't work. Old enemies are now friends & old friends are now enemies. // The annual Zoo Snooze is here! This year the Vesuvius Twins buy up all the tickets. The zoosters plan to exact revenge on the twins.

3057189.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3057189.description: A Delaware Blue Hen has taken up residence at the zoo, and she has the amazing ability to predict the future! // The penguins need a thumb, and Maurice's fits the bill nicely.

3057280.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3057280.description: The penguins discover the abuse that Randy the sheep gets in the children's zoo from all the children tugging at his wool, and decide to find him a new home. // The duckling Eggy is back. The training that the penguins gave him worked.

3074934.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3074934.description: The Penguins are faced with a World Domination battle when Private accidentally unleashes KuchiKukhan the Destroyer of Worlds. Can they stop him in time to save the World?

3074983.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3074983.description: Fred the Squirrel has hit the jackpot.  He stumbles onto a jackpot oak tree which is loaded with acorns (that's tons of money to animal folk). // When a Baby Fossa is delivered to the Zoo everyone is excited except for King Julien.

3077536.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3077536.description: The penguins are on a mission to fulfill wishes. Private tells Mort that if he throws a penny in the fountain his wish will come true. // King Julien has just discovered April Fools Day. Making up for lost time, he terrorizes the zoo with pranks.

3077625.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3077625.description: The toy manufacturer of Rico's doll-girlfriend has upgraded their doll line with a voice chip. // When the penguins are photographed while in action and placed on the new zoo poster they have to stop the presses before the poster gets out.

3091542.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3091542.description: It's a special day when Bada and Bing get a shipment of delicious plantains to eat. Although they jealously guard the African bananas, King Julien's determined to taste them too. // Skipper's losing it. He has to prove he can still lead the squad.

3091586.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3091586.description: The Space Agency sends Private to the moon. His ticket is downgraded to one-way and the other birds can't monkey around if they hope to get him home again. // Snowmageddon hits and traps Skipper and Marlene in the convenience store with X.

3094354.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3094354.description: King Julien observes children chasing each other, calling out "cooties". He deduces that girls pass this wretched "cooties" with a simple touch. // When Rico crashes the Penguins car and rebuilds it himself, it becomes "possessed" and targets Rico.

3094446.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3094446.description: The Amarillo Kid confronts the penguins looking for the infamous Mr. Tux. Apparently the two have a score to settle. // Private is ready to move up in rank within the penguin commando unit, or is he? First he'll have to become a First Class Private.
